name: Creamsicle Pie
recipeIngredient: 1 tbsp grated orange rind (I used fresh)
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix the sweetened condensed milk, egg yolks, orange juice, and orange rind in a bowl until well combined.
2. Pour the mixture into the prepared graham cracker crust.
3. Bake at 325°F for 35 minutes, or until set (check with a knife or toothpick).
4. Meanwhile, mix the softened cream cheese, powdered sugar, sour cream, and vanilla extract until smooth.
5. Remove the pie from the oven and spread the cream cheese mixture over the top of the pie filling.
6. Return the pie to the oven and bake for an additional 10 minutes.
7. Allow the pie to cool completely before serving chilled.
